error_signature: staging page redirects are not working
title: Staging page redirects fail after workspace move
symptom: Users are not redirected to the Home page upon authentication in the staging environment after moving the project to a different workspace.
applies_when: Project moved to a different workspace
root_cause: When a project is moved to a different workspace, the configurations and integrations, such as the Superbase Auth Plugin, may not be properly linked or may require reconfiguration to function correctly in the new environment.
fix_steps: Remove the Superbase Auth Plugin from the project
Re-add the Superbase Auth Plugin to the project
agent_instruction: Reconfigure the Superbase Auth Plugin by removing and re-adding it to the project.
